term_limit: Senate President serves as Lt. Governor

timeline.name: Ron Ramsey
timeline.notes: 49th Lt. Governor. First Republican Lt. Governor in modern TN history. Led GOP takeover of the Senate.

timeline.name: John S. Wilder
timeline.notes: 48th Lt. Governor. Served 36 years, longest tenure as Lt. Governor in US history at the time. State senator 1959-1961 and 1967-2009. In later years, elected with cross-party Republican support. Died January 1, 2010.
